description: nuget-maui-windows probe (.NET MAUI, net8.0-windows10.0.19041.0, UseMaui=true). Assertions built from actual update request on mend-detection-qa-dev/nuget-maui-windows commit 90da5d58 (agent bolt-4-github-scanner 26.5.1-SNAPSHOT / plugin 26.7.1.27): 4 direct NUGET deps, 0 transitives. The scan ran the project.assets.json FALLBACK because the MAUI workload is not installed on the scanner (NETSDK1147) and net8.0-windows cannot restore in the Linux scan container, so no transitive graph was resolved. scaResults reports totalSuccess RESOLUTION:1 / totalFail PRE_STEP:1 -> check_update_request_sca_results WILL FAIL until the workload/Windows-on-Linux restore issue is resolved (this is the environment defect the assertion exists to surface, not a config bug).
